name: Breath of Terramorphous
description: A Vladof grenade that erupts into several fire geysers on impact, dealing sustained incendiary damage across the area. It is best at clearing weaker flesh enemies and can burn through slagged targets quickly, though the scattered geyser pattern makes it less reliable at range or against fast-moving foes.
notes:
Salvador's Double Your Fun lets him throw two for the cost of one, improving both coverage and reliability. Any character can stack multiple throws in the same spot to carpet an area with geysers, while Krieg benefits from the self-immolation synergies in his skill trees.

It uses the `Vladof_5_Legendary` skin. Alongside the other Terramorphous drops, its red text forms part of a short poem, and it is the only grenade mod with E-Tech rarity.

special.description: Creates fire geysers around the point of impact.
special.title: His breath was of fire...
